case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC VS. DONALD R. SCHARF et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-04-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SCHARF, DONALD R. JR. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-31-2009
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE DONALD R SCHARF JR FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-04-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
